content.en:
"Next, create a speed-type legendary eternal skill!"

Ye Tian was very excited in his heart.

He knew very well that once he created a speed-type legendary eternal technique, he would definitely be able to smash the second boundary barrier and completely step into the nine-step Eternal Realm level.

Before you know it, another ten eternal years have passed.

this day.

The speed legendary eternal technique was finally created by Ye Tian.

This speed-type legendary eternal technique was named Infernal by Ye Tian, which meant that for him, the distance had no meaning, representing the ultimate speed.

With the creation of the Infernal Eternal Technique, Ye Tian's strength has increased a lot, and the second boundary barrier in the underworld has finally begun to be completely shattered.

Bang!!!!

The second boundary barrier shattered, and an origin void composed entirely of the innate eternal rule origin appeared in Ye Tian's perception.

Now.

Ye Tian's will turned into a giant sitting in this piece of Origin Void, contemplating this endless innate eternal rule origin all the time, and comprehending it here, as if everything was easy to comprehend thoroughly.

The origin of all the Dao was extremely clear, and any doubts Ye Tian had could be answered here.

In the space-time territory, he did not sense the Origin Void composed of the Innate Eternal Rule Origin.

At this moment, Ye Tian knew why he couldn't break through to the Nine Extremes Realm in the space-time territory, so he couldn't comprehend the Innate Eternal Rule Origin Void in the space-time territory, and he could only comprehend it in the Source Sea.

There seems to be no time limit here, and Ye Tian doesn't know how long he has been enlightened.

It wasn't until a certain moment that he came out of the Origin Void.

Now.

He had already comprehended the true extreme of the Innate Eternal Rules, which was far from being comparable to the Eight Extremes Realm, and he could fuse the Innate Origin Rules at any time to advance to the Eternal Realm.

But like the Nine Extremes Realm in the Eight Extremes Building, he didn't go to the Eternal Realm.

"The Nine Extremes Realm can actually fuse the body with the will, similar to the Immortal Realm impacting the Immortal Realm~~. "

Ye Tian was a little surprised by this.

Once the will and body are fused to more than one percent, the immortal realm can break through to become the immortal realm, and the same is true for the Nine Extremes Realm, if the will and body are fused to more than one percent in the Nine Extremes Realm, after breaking through the eternal realm, it is directly the immortal realm.

Moreover, the physical body of the Nine Extremes Realm was far less powerful than the Immortal Realm, and the body had not yet completely fused with the innate eternal rules, so it was easier to fuse the will.

Therefore, it is relatively easy to fuse the will in the Nine Extremes Realm.

This is also the reason why the Nine Extremes Realm is not in a hurry to break through, once it breaks through in advance, even if it becomes a half-step immortal realm, if you want to become a true craftsman's immortal realm, it will take a long time, which is a very stupid behavior.

And after becoming the Nine Extremes Realm, there is no qualitative change in strength, but after becoming the Nine Extremes Realm, there will be a huge period of improvement in strength. But after the promotion period has passed, it will be difficult to improve the strength, and you can only take the road of fusing the will, and the will fusion will also improve the strength.

Therefore, the Nine Extremes Realm that has really grown up will be many times stronger than the Eight Extremes Realm, but the Nine Extremes Realm that has just broken through is not so powerful.

After breaking through to the Nine Extremes Realm, Ye Tian's will has improved a lot, and he can still continue to cultivate the will world and open up one will world after another.

Moreover, his body could continue to grow, and the half-step eternal power could also continue to be compressed, and it was very easy to compress.

The years passed slowly, Ye Tian's half-step eternal power had been easily compressed to 80 times, and it could continue to be compressed, the stacking secret technique was no longer of much use to Ye Tian, but relying on his mastery of the innate eternal rules, compressing the half-step eternal power was too simple for him.

Not only that, Ye Tian's body was also much stronger than when he had just broken through, but it also consumed almost all of his resources.

Subsequently, Ye Tian created a legendary eternal technique to make his strength even stronger.

In the blink of an eye, a thousand eternal years have passed.

Such a long period of time has allowed Ye Tian's ascension period to completely pass.

And at this moment, Ye Tian's will world had opened up thirty thousand, and his third-order eternal will was probably stronger than many Immortal Realm Lords.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also began to fuse the will, but it was indeed very difficult to fuse the will, he was now only one ten-thousandth of his body fused with the will, and there was still a long way to go before he fused more than one percent.

Of course, there is also a shortcut to merge wills, and that is the Voidmon.

The Voidmon's materials were able to fuse the will, but he had used the Voidmon's materials to improve the will, but it was also to raise the eternal will to the third order, so it was not a waste.

Nowadays, there is still a little bit of those Void Beast materials, but they are not very useful.

If you want to fuse your body and mind more than one, you must have a large amount of Void Beast materials.

However, the space-time territory is aware of the preciousness of the Void Beast materials, and no one wants to trade the Void Beast materials, unless the six legendary lords have no demand for the Void Beast materials, but they will not sell them, and it is also a good choice for their families or loyal subordinates!

"You may be able to ask the Nine Extremes Realm of the Eight Poles Tower, the Stargazing Sword Ancestor!"

The Stargazing Sword Ancestor was in the depths of the Eight Poles Tower, but no one usually bothered him.

Last time, the Stargazing Sword Ancestor also participated in the hunting of the Void Beast, but it was not with Ye Tian and them, after all, as an existence in the Nine Extremes Realm, the Stargazing Sword Ancestor was qualified to join forces with some Immortal Realm Lords to besiege and kill the Void Beast.

It can be said that the circle of the Stargazing Sword Ancestor has reached the Immortal Realm or even the Immortal Realm, and it will not have too many negotiations with those Eight-Pole Realm half-step Eternal Realms in the Eight Extremes Building.

this day.

Ye Tian's copy body entered the Eight Extremes Building, and he immediately announced that he had stepped into the Nine Extremes Realm.

This news quickly detonated the entire Eight Extremes Building, shocking the other Eight Extremes Realms.

The True Yang Saint Ancestor arrived as soon as he could, and said in shock: "Endless Ancestor, you ...... Unexpectedly, he broke through to the Nine Extremes Realm!!!"

The other Eight Extremes Realm arrived one by one, and they felt the Nine Extremes Realm aura on Ye Tian's body (so good), knowing that Ye Tian was not lying.

I haven't seen it for more than a thousand eternal years, and Ye Tian actually broke the second boundary barrier, the speed of this breakthrough is too fast, right?

"Lord Gu He has broken through to the Lord of the Immortal Realm by luck, and the Endless Ancestor has broken through to become the Nine-Pole Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm, in the past thousand or so eternal years, two major things have happened in our Eight Pole Building!"

One of the Eight Extremes Realm sighed with emotion, his tone full of envy.

Whether it is to become the Eternal Realm or to become the Nine Extremes Realm, it is their life's goal!

At this moment, a figure full of endless sword path rules walked out from the depths of the Eight Pole Tower.

"I've seen the Stargazing Sword Ancestor!"

The other Eight Extremes Realms greeted each other.

"Congratulations to the Endless Ancestor!"

The Stargazing Sword Ancestor congratulated.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and the Stargazing Sword Ancestor entered a void in the depths of the Eight Poles Tower, and the two sat down to chat. _
